html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Irina’s shedding has come in waves, but she’s now entering the early regrowth stage—those new baby hairs are proof that her follicles are waking up. Chronic stress and histamine sensitivity have kept the pattern fluctuating, yet this plan teaches her to steady the system. By anchoring sleep, calming stress, and reinforcing nutrition, it helps the scalp and nervous system sync again. From here, the goal is simple: turn these scattered waves into smooth, predictable growth. 🌱

Consistency now locks in your shift from recovery to real regrowth.
